summary: Iteration 109: Testing gallery/filmstrip layout for storyboard panels. Backend: 4/4 API tests passed. Frontend code review: 16/16 tests passed. Total: 20/20 tests passed (100%). The new filmstrip layout correctly replaces the old 3-column grid with a main display + horizontal thumbnail strip pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: StoryboardEditor.jsx line 49-56: selectedFrames state with getSelectedFrame() and selectFrame() helpers correctly implemented
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 417-463: Gallery/filmstrip layout renders when panel.frames?.length > 1
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 421-436: Main display with aspect-video, data-testid='panel-main-frame-{n}', and frame label badge
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 438-461: Horizontal filmstrip with flex layout, data-testid='frame-thumb-{n}-{idx}'
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 445-449: Selected thumbnail has ring-1 ring-[#C9A84C] brightness-100, others have brightness-50
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 443: onClick={() => selectFrame(panel.scene_number, fi) correctly updates selectedFrames state
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 464-469: Falls back to single image when panel has no frames (panels 2-20)
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 481-502: Panel hover shows 3 overlay icons (Maximize2, Paintbrush, Film)
Backend storyboard.py line 246-258: Frame labels correctly defined as ['Plano Geral', 'Close-up', 'Ação', 'Reação', 'Ângulo Dramático', 'Transição']
seed_data_creation: Used existing project fce897cf6ba3 - Panel 1 has 6 frames, Panels 2-20 have 0 frames (single image fallback)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 109 tested the gallery/filmstrip layout redesign: 1) Backend API returns panels with 'frames' array containing 6 items for panel 1, 2) Each frame has frame_number, image_url, label fields with correct Portuguese labels, 3) Frontend uses selectedFrames state to track which frame is selected per panel, 4) Main display shows activeFrame with label badge, 5) Horizontal filmstrip below main display with 6 equal-width thumbnails, 6) Selected thumbnail has golden ring and full brightness, non-selected have dimmed brightness, 7) Clicking thumbnail updates selectedFrames state and main display, 8) Falls back to single image when panel has no frames. The old 3-column grid layout (panel-frames-grid-*) has been replaced with the new filmstrip pattern.

backend_api.GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/storyboard: PASS - Returns panels with frames array

frontend_code_review.Horizontal filmstrip layout: PASS - flex gap-[2px] with flex-1 thumbnails
